title: Spec 3.4 Type Registry
description: Type definitions for Observer Protocol Spec 3.4 - Compliance and Audit Trails

activityTypes.description: Types of agent activities that can be recorded in AgentActivityCredential

transaction_initiated.description: Agent initiated a payment or transfer transaction

transaction_received.description: Agent received a payment or transfer

credential_presented.description: Agent presented a Verifiable Credential to a verifier

credential_received.description: Agent received a Verifiable Credential from an issuer

delegation_issued.description: Agent issued a delegation credential to another agent

delegation_revoked.description: Agent revoked a previously issued delegation

key_rotation.typicalContext: Security best practice, key compromise response

internal_state_change.description: Agent recorded an internal state change

attestation_requested.description: Agent requested an attestation from another agent or service

attestation_received.description: Agent received an attestation from another agent or service
attestation_received.typicalContext: Receipt of trust score, capability verification result

acknowledgmentTypes.description: Types of counterparty acknowledgments in CounterpartyReceiptCredential

credentialTypes.description: Verifiable Credential types defined in Spec 3.4

AgentActivityCredential.description: Self-issued credential where agent declares its own activity
AgentActivityCredential.subject: agent_did

ActivityMerkleRoot.description: Merkle root credential for batched activities
ActivityMerkleRoot.subject: agent_did

timeWindows.description: Standard time windows for coverage metrics per Spec 3.4 §7

7d.description: Weekly rolling window for recent activity

30d.description: Monthly rolling window for trend analysis

90d.description: Quarterly rolling window for compliance reporting

matchTolerance.description: Timestamp tolerance for matching activities to receipts per Spec 3.4 §7
matchTolerance.description_long: Activities and receipts with timestamps within this tolerance window are considered for matching

merkleBatching.description: Merkle tree batching configuration per Spec 3.4 §5
merkleBatching.description_long: Agents batch activities into Merkle trees with one signed root credential per time window

protocolMetadata.name: Observer Protocol Spec 3.4
protocolMetadata.fullName: Observer Protocol Spec 3.4 - Compliance and Audit Trails

excluded: Policy rules that act on audit data

principles.dualSource: Every material agent action produces TWO credentials: AgentActivityCredential (agent-signed) and CounterpartyReceiptCredential (counterparty-signed)
principles.offlineVerification: Verification works WITHOUT OP being reachable
principles.canonicalHashing: Use RFC 8785 (JCS) for canonical JSON in Merkle leaves
